---
id: create-a-subscription
title: "Create a subscription"
description: "Creates a new subscription for a customer. By default the subscription is a copy of the offer at creation time. To override offer parameters (pricing, trial period, features, etc.), include the relevant override fields in the request body."
sidebar_label: "Create a subscription"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/proabono-api-live
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a subscription"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/Subscription"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new subscription for a customer. By default the subscription is a copy of the offer at creation time. To override offer parameters (pricing, trial period, features, etc.), include the relevant override fields in the request body.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
